title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: DeepSeek released V4, a flagship model that achieves significant reductions in inference compute and cost. The video analyzes V4's position in the competition between open and closed AI labs, emphasizing how different national incentives drive distinct approaches to LLM efficiency and intelligence.
